src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.general_idea: Initialize Jdbi instance with SqlObjectPlugin to enable type-safe SQL object mapping for database operations.
Enable environment variable substitution in configuration files using Dropwizard's SubstitutingSourceProvider.
Update health check registration to use dynamic application name and version from configuration instead of hardcoded values.
Register the LinksResource with Jersey, injecting DAOs, Base62Service, and application configuration.
Register the RedirectResource with Jersey, injecting LinkDAO and ClickDAO for click tracking.
Register the MigrationStatusResource with Jersey to expose database migration status.
Add a public getter for the Jdbi instance to allow access from other components if needed.
Remove the unused import for MigrationsBundle to clean up the code.
Add import for NotBlank constraint to support new configuration validation.
Introduce a nested ApplicationConfiguration class to manage application-specific settings like baseUrl, version, and name.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.human_impl: Added 'public static class ApplicationConfiguration' with fields baseUrl, version, name, rateLimitRequestsPerMinute, maxCustomShortCodeLength and their getters/setters.

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.general_idea: Add an application configuration field to the main configuration class to expose the new settings.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.human_impl: Added 'private ApplicationConfiguration application = new ApplicationConfiguration();' with @Valid, @NotNull, and @JsonProperty annotations.

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/UrlShorte.general_idea: Provide getter and setter methods for the new application configuration field.

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.general_idea: Add a field to track the number of clicks for a link to support telemetry features.
Provide getter and setter methods for the new click count field.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.human_impl: public Integer getClickCount() { return clickCount; } public void setClickCount(Integer clickCount) { this.clickCount = clickCount; }

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.general_idea: Remove automatic timestamp generation in the constructor to rely on database defaults instead.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/core/Link.human_impl: // createdAt will be set by database DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.general_idea: Remove the `created_at` column from the INSERT statement, likely delegating timestamp management to the database default or application layer.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.human_impl: Changed SQL from `INSERT INTO links (long_url, short_code, created_at) ...` to `INSERT INTO links (long_url, short_code) ...`

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.general_idea: Add a new DAO method to update the short code of an existing link.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.human_impl: Added `updateShortCode` method with SQL `UPDATE links SET short_code = :shortCode WHERE id = :id`

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.general_idea: Add a new DAO method to increment the click count for telemetry tracking.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/db/LinkDA.human_impl: Added `incrementClickCount` method with SQL `UPDATE links SET click_count = click_count + 1 WHERE id = :id`

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Ba.general_idea: Introduce a new constructor overload to allow injecting a custom application name while maintaining backward compatibility.
Add a field to store the application name for use in health check messages.
Replace hardcoded application name string in health result with the dynamic applicationName field.
src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Ba.human_impl: return Result.healthy(applicationName + " is running. Version: " + version);

src/main/java/com/urlshortener/health/Da.general_idea: Replace passive connection state check with an active SQL query to verify database responsiveness.

dependency-reduced-pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the maven-shade-plugin from pluginManagement as it is no longer required for the build process.
Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from explicit source/target to the unified release flag for better JDK version alignment.
Add the MySQL JDBC driver dependency to support database connectivity.
Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency for writing modern Java tests.
Add Mockito core dependency for mocking objects in unit tests.
Add the JUnit Jupiter aggregate dependency to include engine and params for test execution.
Add Dropwizard testing dependency to enable integration testing for the Dropwizard application.
Import the JUnit BOM in dependencyManagement to manage versions of JUnit dependencies consistently.
Define Maven properties to target JDK 21 for compilation and release.
Define a property for the JUnit version to be used across the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler properties and plugin configuration to target Java 21.
Add MySQL connector dependency to support MySQL database integration.
Add JUnit BOM to manage JUnit 5 dependency versions.
Add JUnit Jupiter API dependency for writing tests with JUnit 5.
Add Mockito core dependency for mocking in unit tests.
Add JUnit Jupiter engine dependency to run JUnit 5 tests.
Add Dropwizard testing dependency for integration testing support.
Remove explicit maven-shade-plugin version definition from pluginManagement.

.idea/dataSources.xml.general_idea: Replace the H2 in-memory database driver reference with the MySQL 8 driver reference in the IDE data source configuration.
Change the JDBC connection URL from an H2 in-memory string to a MySQL localhost connection string.
Update the JDBC driver class name from org.h2.Driver to com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver.
Rename the local data source identifier from 'urlshortener' to 'UrlShortenerApi'.
Remove the Kubernetes deployment resource type property from the JDBC additional properties.

README.md.general_idea: Document the mandatory Java 21 runtime requirement for the project.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Requirements' section specifying Java 21 LTS and installation examples.

README.md.general_idea: Advise updating CI pipelines and Docker images to use JDK 21 base images.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Notes / Next steps' section recommending eclipse-temurin:21-jre.

config.yml.general_idea: Removed explicit shutdown grace period configuration from the server block.
Changed the database driver class from H2 in-memory to MySQL Connector/J.
Updated the JDBC connection URL to point to a local MySQL instance with specific SSL and timezone parameters.
Set specific username and password for the MySQL database connection.
config.yml.human_impl:
-  user: sa
-  password:
+  user: urlshortener_user
+  password: userpass123

config.yml.general_idea: Increased the maximum connection pool size and enabled idle connection checking.
config.yml.human_impl:
-  maxSize: 10
-  checkConnectionWhileIdle: false
+  maxSize: 20
+  checkConnectionWhileIdle: true

config.yml.general_idea: Added a validation query and timeout to ensure connection health in the pool.
Introduced a new application configuration block with base URL, version, name, and rate limiting settings.

src/main/resources/migrations.xml.general_idea: Increase the VARCHAR length of the short_code column to support longer custom codes.
Add an index on the short_code column to optimize lookup performance.
Add a click_count column to the links table to track the number of clicks per link.
Ensure the short_code column is updated to VARCHAR(50) for existing databases.
Create a clicks table to store detailed telemetry data for each link click.
Establish a foreign key relationship between clicks and links tables.
Add an index on the link_id column in the clicks table for efficient joins.
Add an index on the click_timestamp column in the clicks table for time-based queries.
